option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="artist-card page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.MusiquesController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="16.0" left="16.0" right="16.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title-small" text="Musiques" /> <Button fx:id="toggleFormButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleForm" text="Ajouter une musique" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="musiqueSection" spacing="8.0"> <HBox spacing="8.0"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher: titre, description, genre" /> <ComboBox fx:id="sortMusicComboBox" prefWidth="170.0" promptText="Tri" /> </HBox> <Label text="Musiques disponibles" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" prefHeight="360.0"> <content> <TilePane fx:id="musiqueGrid" hgap="10.0" prefColumns="4" vgap="10.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> <Label fx:id="emptyListLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" text="Aucune musique disponible pour le moment." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0" style="-fx-background-color: #171717; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 12;"> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #ffffff; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="Lecture en cours" /> <Label fx:id="nowPlayingTitleLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #ffffff;" text="Selectionnez une musique" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="nowPlayingMetaLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #b0b0b0;" text="Genre: -" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePreviousTrack" text="Prev" /> <Button fx:id="playPauseButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePlayPause" text="Play" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNextTrack" text="Next" /> <Label fx:id="playerStatusLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" text="Pret" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="formSection" spacing="14.0" visible="false" managed="false"> <Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" text="Ajouter une nouvelle musique" />
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Titre *" /> <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="entrez le titre de la musique" /> <Label text="3-255 caractères" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description *" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="5" promptText="entrez la description de la musique" wrapText="true" /> <Label text="10-5000 caractères" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Genre *" /> <ComboBox fx:id="genreComboBox" promptText="Sélectionnez un genre" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Collection" /> <ComboBox fx:id="collectionComboBox" promptText="Sélectionnez une collection" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Image de Couverture" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="imagePathField" editable="false" promptText="Cliquez pour parcourir" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChooseImage" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Label text="Max 5MB (JPEG, PNG)" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Fichier Audio *" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="audioPathField" editable="false" promptText="Cliquez pour parcourir" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChooseAudio" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Label text="Formats acceptes: MP3, M4A, WAV" style="-fx-text-fill: #a0a0a0;" /> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="submitMusiqueButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCreateMusique" text="Creer" /> <Label fx:id="feedbackLabel" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="page-root users-shell" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.artist.MusiquesController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="users-panel list-card music-panel"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="20.0" right="20.0" top="20.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16.0" styleClass="users-header"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des musiques" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="toggleFormButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleToggleForm" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter une musique" /> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0" styleClass="users-toolbar"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" promptText="Rechercher: titre, description, genre" styleClass="table-search" /> <ComboBox fx:id="sortMusicComboBox" prefWidth="190.0" promptText="Tri" styleClass="input-field" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="musiqueSection" spacing="10.0"> <Label styleClass="section-title" text="Musiques disponibles" /> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="users-scroll"> <content> <TilePane fx:id="musiqueGrid" hgap="14.0" prefColumns="4" styleClass="users-cards-grid" vgap="14.0" /> </content> </ScrollPane> <Label fx:id="emptyListLabel" styleClass="users-empty-state" text="Aucune musique disponible pour le moment." wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="8.0" styleClass="music-player-card"> <Label styleClass="music-player-title" text="Lecture en cours" /> <Label fx:id="nowPlayingTitleLabel" styleClass="music-player-now" text="Selectionnez une musique" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="nowPlayingMetaLabel" styleClass="music-player-meta" text="Genre: -" /> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePreviousTrack" styleClass="secondary-action-button" text="Prev" /> <Button fx:id="playPauseButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handlePlayPause" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Play" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleNextTrack" styleClass="secondary-action-button" text="Next" /> <Label fx:id="playerStatusLabel" styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Pret" /> </HBox> </VBox>
</VBox>
<fx:define> <VBox fx:id="formSection" spacing="14.0" styleClass="music-form-panel"> <Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" styleClass="form-title" text="Ajouter une nouvelle musique" />
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Titre *" /> <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Entrez le titre de la musique" styleClass="input-field" /> <Label styleClass="section-subtitle" text="3-255 caracteres" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Description *" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="5" promptText="Entrez la description de la musique" styleClass="input-field" wrapText="true" /> <Label styleClass="section-subtitle" text="10-5000 caracteres" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Genre *" /> <ComboBox fx:id="genreComboBox" promptText="Selectionnez un genre" styleClass="input-field" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Collection" /> <ComboBox fx:id="collectionComboBox" promptText="Selectionnez une collection" styleClass="input-field" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Image de couverture" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="imagePathField" editable="false" promptText="Cliquez pour parcourir" styleClass="input-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChooseImage" styleClass="secondary-button" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Max 5MB (JPEG, PNG)" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label styleClass="field-label" text="Fichier audio *" /> <HBox spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="audioPathField" editable="false" promptText="Cliquez pour parcourir" styleClass="input-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleChooseAudio" styleClass="secondary-button" text="Parcourir" /> </HBox> <Label styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Formats acceptes: MP3, M4A, WAV" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10.0"> <Button fx:id="submitMusiqueButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleCreateMusique" styleClass="primary-button" text="Creer" /> </HBox> <Label fx:id="feedbackLabel" styleClass="section-subtitle" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </fx:define> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
